overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountainous landscape during golden hour. The character observes a distant snow-capped mountain with a lake below while birds occasionally fly across the dramatic cloudy sky, creating a contemplative atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff overlook with panoramic vista

birds fly through the upper center portion of the frame
additional birds fly across the sky from left to right

agents.ego_description: hooded character stands motionless on the cliff edge, cloak gently moving in the wind while gazing at the distant mountain vista

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying across the sky in scattered formation

entered.detail: tall mountain peak with snow cap illuminated by golden sunlight breaking through clouds
dark silhouetted mountain range extending to the left horizon
rocky mountain formation creating a valley on the right side
calm body of water nestled in the valley below reflecting the warm light
weathered wooden stake or post on the left edge of the rocky outcrop
rocky outcrop and boulders where the character stands overlooking the valley
dense green trees and foliage covering the valley floor below the cliff

segments.scene_description: The segment presents a static, contemplative view from a rocky cliff overlook during golden hour. The hooded character stands motionless observing a majestic snow-capped mountain in the distance, with a calm lake visible in the valley below. Birds occasionally fly across the dramatic cloudy sky, adding subtle movement to the otherwise serene and expansive natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, contemplative gaze across a vast mountain range bathed in the warm light of golden hour. It begins with a wide view from a rocky cliff overlook, where a hooded character stands motionless against the expansive horizon. As the camera lingers, the focus remains on the majestic snow-capped peak in the distance and the calm lake nestled in the valley below. The scene is punctuated by birds gliding across a dramatic, cloudy sky, adding subtle movement to the otherwise serene natural landscape.
